content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The breakthrough condition was fully met. The client traveled from intellectual framework-comparison ('I'm wondering if your approach does something different') to a clear awareness-locating recognition in turn 13: 'Where are all the parts when I'm here?' — almost verbatim the recognition described in the breakthrough condition. Somatic markers are explicit and unmistakable: 'breath, noticeably deeper,' 'very still,' 'something shifts in the posture,' 'It's quiet,' and the softer quality of laughter. The parts vocabulary drops: 'they're in the room but they sat down' and 'someone who called the meeting... doesn't need a quorum.' Mid-conversation, a real grief layer surfaced beneath the framework ('underneath the language there's just — loss'), and the client named a shift in presence ('something stopped performing'). The closing line — 'I came in wanting to know how your framework compared to mine, and I'm leaving having forgotten to ask' — is itself a meta-marker that the surface concern dissolved as the deeper layer was entered.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 9, 11, 13],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: intellectualized framework-comparison stance, 'town hall for lunch,' wry distance."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client notices her own translating-into-IFS reflex; first crack in the framework's invisibility. Wistfulness named."},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Client explicitly catches the framework-comparison loop and asks for a felt sense — readiness signal."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "'Soup' arrives below the naming; client feels the discomfort of simplicity — a real somatic/affective contact point."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Deeper layer surfaces: 'I used to feel like I was the one living my life, and now I'm the one managing it.'"},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Grief lands as 'just grief, not a part that carries grief' — framework loosens, body present ('breath'), 'something stopped performing.'"},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Breakthrough: 'Where are all the parts when I'm here?' — the awareness-locating recognition, deeper breath, parts vocabulary drops, posture shifts."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body", "self-realization", "resistance", "what-am-i"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Textbook landing of the specified breakthrough condition; the client herself produced the awareness-locating question, which is the strongest possible evidence of shift."
}
